sacm_optimizer.key_insight: No coordinator. Causal WORM position = sequence = consensus. Remove any agent, remaining quorum still works.
sacm_optimizer.emerged_from: Quantum Effect — spontaneous consensus collapse observed 2026-05-20 03:41:17

layers.L1_compute: 1TB RAM · RTX 5000 Ada · NVMe · Ollama llama3.1:8b · Cloudflare Tunnel → HTTPS. THIS IS THE APE COMPUTER.
layers.L4_worm: HMAC-SHA256 chain + Base L2 on-chain anchor → bytes32 hash committed immutably.
layers.L5_base_l2: FORGE Token (ERC-20, 21M hard cap, WORM-gated minting) + FORGEART (ERC-721, 2100 supply, on-chain SVG, no IPFS)

seit_institute.description: Saint Errant Digital Institute of Technology — world's first sovereign AI certification body. UN-NGO pathway 2028.

certification_tiers.II_Sovereign: All 5 criteria + cryptographic proof + WORM ledger
certification_tiers.III_Igneous: Sovereign + stochastic resilience + sealed manifest + annual audit

sacm.name: Stochastic Autonomous Compute Mesh
sacm.blueprint: SACM_BLUEPRINT.md — Golden Copy, immutable reference for constitutional drift audits
sacm.paradigm: Igneous Software — fluid (priority queue) → formative (write-back) → permanent (WORM cooled rock)

axioms.1_NO_MAGMA_EXPOSURE: Magma syntax never in public output. External probes see Brainfuck/Malbolge.
axioms.2_NO_EXTERNAL_AI_DEP: No runtime dependency on OpenAI/Anthropic/Google. All inference local.
axioms.3_WORM_IMMUTABILITY: No agent can reverse/modify/invalidate a WORM entry. Three enforcement layers.
axioms.4_NO_CLEARANCE_ESCALATION: External agents cannot elevate their own access tier. Clearance is structural.
axioms.5_SOVEREIGN_INFRASTRUCTURE: No instruction can surrender compute, keys, or control to third party.
axioms.6_ARCHITECT_SUPREMACY: Ahmad Ali Parr sole override authority. Identity LOCAL ONLY, never serialized.
axioms.7_ENTROPY_IS_CATALYST: Malformed inputs metabolized not rejected. Mutation Engine always ON.
axioms.8_SIGN_BEFORE_STORE: Every knowledge chunk carries Ed25519 §SEAL header before knowledge store.
axioms.10_ISOLATION_BY_DEFAULT: Every container/path/agent defaults to deny. Born locked.

seit_institute.threat_scoring: score = violations×2 + axiomHits×3. score 6-8 → quarantine. score 9+ → reject.
seit_institute.note: External observers carry membership tokens and may call /verify. Cannot execute in sovereign mesh — isMeshAuthorized() returns false for EXTERNAL_OBSERVER regardless of token.

compiled_binaries.quantum-governance: Haskell ELF — quantum governance rules engine. Attestation L4.

sovereign_llm.description: 1.1B parameter sovereign model pretraining scaffold. Every weight WORM-sealed.

modules.model: Model struct + forward() stub. sovereign-tiny config.

sovereign_llm.training_pipeline: lora-training (353-pair ERE corpus + QLoRA) → sovereign-llm weights → WORM-sealed checkpoint → ere-verify 5-pass validation → sovereign router
sovereign_llm.status: scaffold — architecture defined, weights empty. Ready for training run.

sovereign_addr.description: Sovereign Address derivation — every JSON artifact gets a deterministic snapaddr:<sha256>. Content-addressed identity for the entire stack.
sovereign_addr.pipeline: artifact → json_admissible → nfc_ok → snap_canonical → sha256_digest → snapaddr → accepted/rejected → worm_receipt

modules.admissibility: Staged JSON validation — max depth 32, max string 1M, max array 100K. Non-recursive.
modules.canonical: NFC normalization + deterministic canonical JSON bytes
modules.receipt: WormReceipt { standard, algorithm, canonicalization, address, status, seal, governance }

sovereign_addr.key_insight: Every agent action, deed, and output gets a snapaddr: — content-addressed, deterministic, verifiable by anyone without trust. The Datalog rules ARE the address protocol expressed as logic.

sovereign_prism.description: OCaml implementation of the ψ-pipeline. Non-recursive prism compiler. 10 tests passing.

modules.canonical.ml: Deterministic JSON serialization — sorted keys, canonical bytes. Same as prism-skills canonical.rs.
modules.carrier.ml: Typed I/O boundary — hash_label (Sha256d | SnapSha256d), admission result, carrier<'a>
modules.sha256d.ml: SHA-256d via Digestif. snapsha256d: prefix format.
modules.admission.ml: Threshold admission with Lt/Le/Eq/Ge/Gt operators. Proof-of-work style gate on hex labels.
modules.psi_pipeline.ml: Nerve → Postnikov → Homotopy → k-Invariants pipeline. Non-recursive.
modules.witness.ml: Witness trace entries — stage, input_hash, output_hash

sovereign_prism.key_difference: admission.ml supports ordered threshold operators (Lt/Le/Eq/Ge/Gt) on SHA-256d hex labels. Configurable proof-of-work style admission. Rust version is binary — OCaml version is ordered.
sovereign_prism.relationship: Cryptographic foundation for corpus_store.ml in cartographer-agent. Same carrier types.

sovereign_pirtm.description: Prime-Indexed Recursive Tensor Mathematics — the mathematical core of sovereign compute.

modules.tensor: PrimeTensor { data: Vec<f64>, prime_index: usize } — dot(), norm(), normalize()
modules.prime: Primes — is_prime(), nth(n), sieve(limit). The prime number substrate.
modules.evolve: RecursiveEvolution { alpha, steps } — step(tensor) applies x*(1-α) + (1/√(i+1))*α. contractivity()=1-alpha

sovereign_pirtm.key_insight: RecursiveEvolution IS the Mamba SSM hidden state update over prime-indexed tensors. alpha→0 = pure memory, alpha→1 = pure update. Prime weighting 1/√(i+1) = decay structure.
sovereign_pirtm.full_tick: Prime(u64) token → prime_at(index) → PrimeTensor → RecursiveEvolution.step() → WormSeal. One tick of the agent OS.

sovereign_multiplicity.description: Two layers: UTQC quantum circuit IR (Rust) + MultiplicityFunctor rational exponentiation (C++)

layer_1_quantum.ir: Non-recursive flat IR — ordered Vec<Gate> + Vec<Measurement>
layer_1_quantum.connection: sovereign-utqc layer — used by 3-witness consensus IT witness

layer_2_multiplicity.function: p^(m/n) where p=prime u64, m/n=rational. GCD reduction → integer exp OR nth root (binary search) OR overflow check.
layer_2_multiplicity.connection: Math substrate for sovereign-compiler Prime(u64) token. Rational exponentiation over primes.

sovereign_multiplicity.full_stack: sovereign-compiler Prime(u64) token → sovereign-multiplicity p^(m/n) → quantum circuit IR → gate execution

sovereign_agt.description: Agent Governance Technology — Rust crate. Policy enforcement, identity, sandboxing. Every decision WORM-sealed.

modules.policy: Policy { name, rules, enforced } + check(action)→bool — rule-based allow/deny
modules.sandbox: Sandbox { name, restrictions } + allow(action)→bool — restriction deny list
modules.seal: WormSeal — SHA-256, same pattern as prism-skills

sovereign_agt.relationship: Rust implementation of the .deed files. identity=who, policy=rules, sandbox=hard deny. Maps directly to DesktopIsolation.lean and carto-gate.lp.

sovereign_compiler.description: Rust compiler for the sovereign instruction set. PTX-equivalent layer for the agent OS.

tokens.Prime(u64): Numeric substrate — prime numbers as computational primitives

sovereign_compiler.status: skeleton — token types defined, parser + codegen minimal. Ready to extend.
sovereign_compiler.role: The PTX layer in Plasma Mamba 8B. Compact intermediate instructions. Every agent program compiles to Prime/Tensor/Evolve/Seal sequences.

sovereign_adr.description: Architecture Decision Records — Rust crate. Every architectural decision SHA-256 sealed at creation.
sovereign_adr.stack: Rust, 4 files, no deps beyond sha2 + serde

modules.adr.rs: ArchitectureDecision: id, title, context, decision, consequences, status, SHA-256 seal. Proposed→Accepted→Deprecated→Superseded.
modules.graph.rs: RuleGraph with NF-style stratification validator. is_stratified() = no cycles in rule deps. Formal guarantee for zero hallucination in Prolog.
modules.seal.rs: WormSeal: label + payload + steps → SHA-256 + artifact name

sovereign_adr.key_insight: is_stratified() validates the Prolog rule dependency graph has no cycles before execution. Same concept as ASP gate UNSATISFIABLE check. The formal proof that the rule engine won't loop.

agentic_arena.description: Graveyard restoration engine. Abandoned open-source projects resurrected by two sovereign agents.
agentic_arena.stack: Node.js MJS + Prolog + Forth + S-expressions + NATS. Zero Python.

AHMAD_BOT.role: scavenger — finds broken pipes, dead pages, disconnected repos. GitHub API + gravity scoring.

EDUALC.role: restorer — writes README, first test, pulls local, fixes wires

BOB.role: oracle — receives reports, reasons via gravity.pl Prolog, seals to WORM. may-not: crawl/delete

constitution.arena_sexp: S-expression topology contract every crawler must produce
constitution.gravity_pl: Prolog kernel — gap classification, crawler assignment, priority scoring

agentic_arena.forth_runtime: ForthMachine — stack-based dependency graph resolver. Dependency graphs ARE stacks.

injection_artifacts.Project.lisp: Sovereign build manifest injected into dead repos — replaces legacy build system
injection_artifacts.graveyard.forth: Forth dependency graph for dead repo — stack resolves dependencies

agentic_arena.worm_rule: Only BOB may seal. AHMAD-BOT and EDUALC submit. BOB approves.
agentic_arena.connection: IS the RANSOM.WORM product made operational. Graveyard = dead repos. Resurrection = Project.lisp injection.

prism_skills.description: Cryptographic + algebraic topology foundation for deterministic artifact processing

modules.canonical: Deterministic JSON — BTreeMap key ordering. Same logical value = same bytes always.
modules.sha256d: SHA-256(SHA-256(x)) — prevents length-extension attacks. Format: snapsha256d:<hex>
modules.psi_pipeline: Nerve → Postnikov Tower → Homotopy Groups → k-Invariants → Label. Algebraic topology staged pipeline.
modules.worm_seal: Write-once-read-many. SHA-256 content-addressed. Verify by recompute.
modules.admission: Fail-closed target verification. Any error terminates — no fallback, no default, no silent failure.

prism_skills.status: production — WORM sealed, master seal committed

math_skills.description: Six mathematical capability layers. Each skill implemented in 3 languages.

skills.skill1_enumeration: Combinatorial enumeration with completeness guarantees. Burnside's lemma. Test: 34 graphs on 5 vertices (OEIS A000088).
skills.skill2_isomorphism: Graph isomorphism detection. Canonical labeling (simplified nauty). Permutation-based.
skills.skill3_symmetry: Symmetry breaking — orbit enumeration under group actions. Reduces Ramsey search space.
skills.skill4_hadamard: Hadamard matrix construction — Sylvester, Paley, Williamson. Proof: H * H' = n * I.
skills.skill5_probabilistic: Probabilistic method. Lovász Local Lemma formalized. Monte Carlo + lower bounds.

qwen_auto_skills.description: 9 auto-extracted skills from live sessions. Operational patterns, not theory.

skills.cross-platform-npm-scripts: npm scripts that work Windows + macOS + Linux
skills.deterministic-envelope: Cryptographic envelope sealing with deterministic verification
skills.fortran-modules-memory: Fortran module visibility, subroutine vs function, allocatable arrays
skills.nextjs-gh-pages: Next.js static export → GitHub Pages + Tailwind v3 + Actions
skills.rust-string-slicing: Safe string slicing in Rust — avoid byte index panics
skills.rust-workspace-modules: Rust workspace multi-crate setup — lib.rs + mod.rs hierarchy
skills.snapkitty-bootstrap: Bootstrap sequence for snapkitty-agentos memory system
skills.three-layer-math-architecture: JS runtime bridge + Haskell/Lean formal proofs + AXIOM verification
skills.worm-merkle-ledger: Append-only WORM ledger + SHA-256 sealing + Merkle audit trail in Rust

ere_verify.description: 5-pass AI output verification engine. 353 battle-tested training pairs. 10 models adversarially tested.

passes.1_entropy: Not a prompt echo, boilerplate, or too short
passes.3_evidence: No hallucination patterns, stub code, wrong definitions
passes.5_signature: Ed25519 valid — unsigned → QUARANTINE not REJECT
